# HappyBein
# Version: 1.8
# Last updated: 2026-05-13
# Framework: Astro 4 + Tailwind CSS (migrated from vanilla HTML)
# Changelog:
#   v1.8 (2026-05-13) — Initiatives page categorised into Insights & Tools / Small Apps / Foundation; nav grouped
#   v1.7 (2026-05-13) — Full French (FR) translation; language toggle in nav; hreflang SEO tags; shareable /fr/ URLs
#   v1.6 (2026-05-13) — Added DailyTracker initiative; self-hosted favicon; OG social image generated
#   v1.5 (2026-05-13) — Migrated to Astro framework; component-based architecture
#   v1.4 (2026-05-13) — Fixed nav dropdown hover gap; initiative links to external URLs
#   v1.3 (2026-05-13) — Fixed iOS WebKit card rendering
#   v1.2 (2026-05-13) — Added SpeakNote initiative
#   v1.1 (2026-05-13) — Added initiatives page; nav restructure; real logo; collapsible cards
#   v1.0 (2026-05-13) — Initial static site migrated from WordPress to Cloudflare Pages

> A purpose-driven foundation dedicated to simplifying societal complexity so that every citizen and leader can make conscious, informed, and impactful decisions.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://happybein.com/): Overview of HappyBein and YeahVibe.
- [The HappyBein Manifesto](https://happybein.com/manifesto): Why we exist, how we operate, and what we believe.
- [YeahVibe Roadmap](https://happybein.com/roadmap): Three-phase product roadmap.
- [Our Initiatives](https://happybein.com/initiatives): All seven active tools in the Yeah ecosystem.
- [Connect & Collaborate](https://happybein.com/contact): Email: happybein1@gmail.com

## Initiatives

- [HappyBein Foundation](https://happybein.com/initiatives#happybein): The architect. Non-profit research studio. Eindhoven, NL. Founded 2021.
- [YeahVibe](https://yeahvibe.com): Core platform. Free modular Life Recipes around 5 Pillars of Leverage.
- [YeahSight](https://yeahsight.com): World context tool. Decodes global trends into plain language.
- [YeahDev](https://yeahdev.com): Article repository. No-fluff knowledge for founders and makers.
- [YeahVibe Workout](https://workout.yeahvibe.com): Micro-exercise tool. Random exercises for home/office. FR/EN.
- [YeahVibe GameTrack](https://gametrack.yeahvibe.com): Score tracker for board games and multiplayer activities.
- [SpeakNote](https://speaknote.happybein.com): Voice transcription. Multi-language, 100% local, clipboard export.
- [DailyTracker](https://dailytracker.yeahvibe.com): Habit tracker. Tick daily habits, get rewarded for consistency streaks. Simple, fast, no account needed.

## About

- Organisation: Non-profit foundation
- Location: Eindhoven, Netherlands
- Contact: happybein1@gmail.com

- Founded: 2021
